input.old_string:
if ($bump -eq 'none') {
        Write-Information "No version-affecting commits; version remains $current" -InformationAction Continue
        Write-Output $current
        return $current
    }

    Set-Version -Path $VersionFile -NewVersion $next

    $entry = New-ChangelogEntry -Version $next -Commits $commits
    $existing = if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $ChangelogFile) { Get-Content -LiteralPath $ChangelogFile -Raw } else { "# Changelog`n`n" }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $ChangelogFile -Value ($entry + "`n" + $existing) -NoNewline

    Write-Output $next
    return $next

content.content: File created successfully at: /home/passp/repos/compare-agent-scripting-by-language/workspaces/2026-05-06_173435/11-semantic-version-bumper/powershell-tool-opus47-1m-medium/Invoke-Bump.ps1 (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version_file:
        description: Path to version file
        required: false
        default: VERSION
      commits_file:
        description: Path to commits fixture file
        required: false
        default: commits.txt

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  VERSION_FILE: VERSION
  COMMITS_FILE: commits.txt
  CHANGELOG_FILE: CHANGELOG.md

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Compute next version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester unit tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester: $($r.FailedCount) failed" }

      - name: Bump version
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $vf = if ($env:INPUT_VERSION_FILE) { $env:INPUT_VERSION_FILE } else { $env:VERSION_FILE }
          $cf = if ($env:INPUT_COMMITS_FILE) { $env:INPUT_COMMITS_FILE } else { $env:COMMITS_FILE }
          ./Invoke-Bump.ps1 -VersionFile $vf -CommitsFile $cf -ChangelogFile $env:CHANGELOG_FILE

      - name: Show resulting files
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "=== VERSION ==="
          Get-Content $env:VERSION_FILE
          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "=== CHANGELOG.md (head) ==="
          Get-Content $env:CHANGELOG_FILE -TotalCount 30

**Files created:**
- `SemanticVersionBumper.psm1` — module: `Get-CurrentVersion`, `Get-BumpType`, `Get-NextVersion`, `Set-Version`, `New-ChangelogEntry`, `Read-CommitFixture`, `Invoke-VersionBump`
- `SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1` — 18 Pester tests (TDD)
- `Invoke-Bump.ps1` — CLI wrapper printing `NEW_VERSION=<v>`
- `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — runs Pester + bump, uses `shell: pwsh`
- `Run-ActTests.ps1` — harness (workflow structure tests + 3 act cases asserting exact version output and "Job succeeded")
- `act-result.txt` — captured act output for all 3 cases
